description: Confirmed booking with failed sync and active projection is an operational fault that requires worker-level remediation.
Confirmed synced booking with active projection is the steady state owned by booking lifecycle.
Attendee decline does not automatically cancel host booking in current product semantics.
Combination is forbidden by reviewed structural semantics and should alert immediately.
Transient states while sync pipeline is actively processing are legal operationally.
Terminal booking must not retain active external projection and requires repair.
Terminal booking with tombstoned projection is converged steady semantics.
